U0LCR.description: UART0 Line Control Register used to set word length, parity, stop bits, and DLAB.
U0LCR.effect: Writing 0x83 enables DLAB and configures 8-bit frame format before baud divisor updates.

U0DLL.description: UART0 Divisor Latch LSB for baud rate generation.
U0DLL.effect: Sets lower 8 bits of baud divisor when DLAB is set in U0LCR.

U0DLM.description: UART0 Divisor Latch MSB for baud rate generation.
U0DLM.effect: Sets upper 8 bits of baud divisor when DLAB is enabled.

U0LSR.description: UART0 Line Status Register indicating TX/RX state and framing errors.
U0LSR.effect: Used to poll UART readiness flags like THRE and RDR before data access.

AD0CR.description: ADC0 Control Register for channel select, clock divider, and conversion start.
AD0CR.effect: Configures ADC operating mode and controls conversion trigger behavior.

AD0DR1.description: ADC0 Data Register for channel 1 conversion result and DONE bit.
AD0DR1.effect: Contains 10-bit sampled value and status after conversion completes.

PINSEL0.description: Pin function select register for port 0 lower pins.
PINSEL0.effect: Assigns alternate peripheral functions (UART/SPI/I2C/PWM) to pins.

PINSEL1.description: Pin function select register for port 0 upper pins.
PINSEL1.effect: Maps analog/peripheral functions such as ADC channels to P0.16-P0.31.
